ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the city */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the weather data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the weather data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "weekofyear" INTEGER /* Week of the year the weather data was collected */,
  "ndvi_ne" REAL /* NDVI (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index) values for the northeast region */,
  "ndvi_nw" REAL /* NDVI values for the northwest region */,
  "ndvi_se" REAL /* NDVI values for the southeast region */,
  "ndvi_sw" REAL /* NDVI values for the southwest region */,
  "reanalysis_dew_point_temp_k" REAL /* Reanalysis dew point temperature in Kelvin */,
  "reanalysis_precip_amt_kg_per_m2" REAL /* Reanalysis precipitation amount in kg/m^2 */,
  "reanalysis_relative_humidity_percent" REAL /* Reanalysis relative humidity percentage */,
  "reanalysis_specific_humidity_g_per_kg" REAL /* Reanalysis specific humidity in g/kg */,
  "station_avg_temp_c" REAL /* Station average temperature in Celsius */,
  "station_diur_temp_rng_c" REAL /* Station diurnal temperature range in Celsius */,
  "station_max_temp_c" REAL /* Station maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "station_min_temp_c" REAL /* Station minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "station_precip_mm" REAL /* Station precipitation in mm */,
  "temp_dew" INTEGER /* Temperature dew point */,
  "temp_dew_l4" INTEGER /* Temperature dew point lagged by 4 weeks */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weather type */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "research_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_team_members" (
  "research_team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team-member combination */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_team_members_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "research_project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the research project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id")
)
